tasks.subject: Task 1: Data-model foundations (schema, migration, enums)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the OutboxJob table, deferred FK indexes, nullable Annotation.severity/category, and the SEVERITIES value-set; run the additive migration.

**Files:** prisma/schema.prisma, lib/enums.ts, tests/unit/schema.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** OutboxJob defaults PENDING/0/6; Annotation severity+category nullable round-trip; FK indexes in migration SQL; SEVERITIES exported [BLOCKER,MAJOR,MINOR,NIT]; migration applied + tests green.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/schema.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "lib/enums.ts", "tests/unit/schema.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/schema.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["OutboxJob defaults PENDING/0/6", "Annotation severity+category nullable round-trip", "FK indexes in migration", "SEVERITIES exported", "migration applied + tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Pure backoff function
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement computeBackoffMs(attempts) in lib/outbox.ts — explicit env-tunable delay table, clamped past last entry, pure (no DB).

**Files:** Create lib/outbox.ts; Test tests/unit/outbox-backoff.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** computeBackoffMs(1..5) → 60_000,300_000,1_800_000,7_200_000,21_600_000; (6+) clamps to 21_600_000; OUTBOX_BACKOFF_MS="10,20,30" overrides.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/outbox-backoff.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/outbox.ts", "tests/unit/outbox-backoff.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/outbox-backoff.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default table for 1..5", "clamp past length", "OUTBOX_BACKOFF_MS override"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Outbox engine — enqueue, registry, tick worker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Complete lib/outbox.ts: enqueue, registerHandler, recoverStuckJobs, tick, startOutboxWorker (idempotent, globalThis-guarded, auto-start off under test).

**Files:** Modify lib/outbox.ts; Test tests/unit/outbox.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** enqueue writes PENDING row + delayMs future nextAttemptAt; tick runs handler → DONE; throwing handler retries w/ backoff (PENDING+lastError) then DEAD at maxAttempts; unknown type → DEAD; recoverStuckJobs DELIVERING→PENDING; tick skips future jobs; startOutboxWorker idempotent + no auto-start under NODE_ENV=test.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/outbox.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/outbox.ts", "tests/unit/outbox.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/outbox.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["enqueue PENDING + delayMs", "tick DONE on success", "retry/backoff then DEAD at maxAttempts", "unknown type DEAD", "recoverStuckJobs DELIVERING→PENDING", "skip future jobs", "startOutboxWorker idempotent + off in test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Re-home email digest onto the outbox
tasks.description:
**Goal:** lib/email-digest.ts keeps in-memory coalescer but on window close enqueues one email.digest job; render+send moves into a registered handler (registerEmailDigestHandler()).

**Files:** Modify lib/email-digest.ts, tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** burst of N events in one window → exactly one email.digest job with all events; enqueueEmailEvent no-ops (no enqueue) when unconfigured; handler renders+sends via sendMail once reading userId/documentId/events; enqueueEmailEvent signature unchanged.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/email-digest.ts", "tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["one email.digest job per window with all events", "no enqueue when unconfigured", "handler sends once", "enqueueEmailEvent signature unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Worker bootstrap (instrumentation.ts) + env docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Launch worker once at server start via Next 16 instrumentation.ts (register handlers first); document OUTBOX_* env vars.

**Files:** Create instrumentation.ts (repo root); Modify .env.example; Test tests/unit/instrumentation.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** register() no-ops when NEXT_RUNTIME!=="nodejs"; on nodejs calls registerEmailDigestHandler() then startOutboxWorker(); .env.example documents OUTBOX_WORKER_AUTOSTART/POLL_MS/BACKOFF_MS/MAX_ATTEMPTS (MAX_ATTEMPTS = DB column default caveat).

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/instrumentation.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["instrumentation.ts", ".env.example", "tests/unit/instrumentation.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/instrumentation.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["edge runtime no-op", "nodejs registers handlers then starts worker", ".env.example documents OUTBOX_* vars"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Full verification (suite, lint, build, e2e smoke)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm whole phase green end-to-end before PR.

**Files:** none (verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:** CI=true pnpm test:unit entire suite green; CI=true pnpm lint clean; CI=true pnpm build succeeds (instrumentation compiles); CI=true pnpm test:e2e green (port 3000 freed first).

**Verify:** all four commands exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit && CI=true pnpm lint && CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full unit suite green", "lint clean", "build succeeds", "e2e green after freeing port 3000"]}
```
